name: Berry Fillings for Pierogies
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the berries and drain them.
2. In a medium bowl, sprinkle the berries with sugar.
3. Mix the berries lightly with the sugar.
4. Fill pierogi shells immediately before juice is drawn out of the fruit.
5. This filling makes about 4 cups or enough to fill 40 to 45 pierogies.
Note: Do not keep filled pierogi shells exposed for too long, as moisture will draw from the berries.
